Sapients are beings which are capable of engaging in [[relevance realization]] and thus are vulnerable to the [[Seven Plagues]]. 

They include [[Modosapients]] and [[Transapients]].

They are sometimes called Sophonts based on [[toposophic levels]], or Synthesizers in contrast to [[asynthesizers]]

== Necessary traits of Sapients ==
As [[humans]] are the only known existing type of Sapients and the closest other organisms are seemingly [[asynthesizers]] such as Chimpanzees, elephants, and dolphins it is unclear whether all sapients are necessarily humanlike, and whether there is an intermediate state between [[asynthesizers]] and sapient which has some but not all of these traits.

Traits include

* use of [[language]] and development of [[mythology]]
* recursive usage of [[servitors]] and [[relevance realization]]
*[[desire synthesis]]

[[Category:Sapients]]
[[sn:Sapients]][[Category:Learners]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Sapients]]==See Also==
* [[Humans]]
[[Category:Pages]]
